untranslatable_reason: This is a pure ranking/decile-based momentum strategy that cannot be expressed as indicator thresholds. The core logic requires: (1) computing 12-month raw returns for all BSE-500 stocks, (2) ranking them, (3) selecting the top decile by percentile rank. This requires portfolio-level ranking logic, not individual stock technical indicators. The allowed indicator set does not support relative ranking across a universe of stocks or decile selection mechanics.
translation_notes: Signal SSRN_2785541_5 is a 12x12 momentum strategy (12-month lookback, 12-month hold). Entry is defined by ranking into top decile, which is a cross-sectional operation unavailable in a single-stock rule engine. Recommend implementing as a custom portfolio ranking module rather than as threshold-based conditions on individual indicators.
